Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Answer To Plf'S Unverified First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA SOUND IMAGE, INC. Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Answer To Pltf'S Unverified First Amended Complaint

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA SOUND IMAGE, INC.'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Answer To Pltf'S Unverified First Amended Complaint.

Southern California Sound Image, Inc.'s "motion for leave to file a first amended answer to plaintiff's unverified first amended complaint" is granted. "That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP 428.50(c).) No trial date is set in this case.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
